unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Label the picture with the words in the list: arm, leg, mouth...
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 长长的手臂(arm)可以抱住农场(farm)的小羊。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: When you eat a meal, you use your mouth.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 嘴巴(mouth)张得大，像一只小老鼠(mouse)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Our muscles will not be as strong as now.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 强壮的肌肉(muscle)需要经常锻炼。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Our fingers will get longer.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 歌唱家(singer)用灵活的手指(finger)弹琴。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: A points to the hair, G to the thumb.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 竖起大拇指(thumb)，因为你跳(jump)得高。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I think I've got a problem with my ankle.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 叔叔(uncle)走路时不小心扭伤了脚踝(ankle)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Match the words with the photos: ankle, back, elbow...
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 手肘(elbow)在肩膀的下面(below)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: My shoulder hurts.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 士兵(soldier)的肩膀(shoulder)很宽阔。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: My stomach really isn't too good this morning.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 看比赛(match)时太紧张，肚子(stomach)痛。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: B: A chin/throat.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 在船(boat)上大声喊，喊哑了喉咙(throat)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Don't eat so quickly you'll bite your tongue.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 年轻(young)人喜欢吐舌头(tongue)做鬼脸。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Now I've got backache.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 长时间坐着会背痛(backache)，还会头痛(headache)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: The main reason is that we have more and more technology.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 科技(technology)改变了我们的生活。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Well, no one can be 100 per cent sure, but here are some possibilities.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 一切皆有可能(possibility)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Our muscles will not be as strong because we won't do a lot of physical work.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 做体力活(physical work)能强身健体。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: So it will probably disappear some time in the future.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 魔术师让兔子消失(disappear)了。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: You don't have to do sport to be healthy and keep fit.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 不要总坐着(sit)，要运动来保持健康(keep fit)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Who can you talk to about a headache?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 头(head)痛(ache)真难受。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: LOOK! stomach ache, ear ache...
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 肚子(stomach)痛(ache)得打滚。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: LOOK! stomach ache, ear ache...
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 耳朵(ear)痛(ache)影响听力。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: LOOK! stomach ache, ear ache, headache, toothache.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 牙(tooth)痛(ache)不是病，痛起来真要命。
